note: Environment capability: Docker available/running, git clean/origin-synced on entry, services active, /api/status healthy, no verify/build/deploy overlap beyond non-production tsserver LSP, logs clean, swap steady at one 6G /swapfile. Selected user journey: /backups create/schedule backup form accessibility after Durable Job backup creation. Closed with visible htmlFor/id labels, regression coverage, production authenticated DOM proof, full npm run verify, restart, smoke 25/25, clean logs, and QA user cleanup.

lastRun.title: Backups create/schedule form visible labels
lastRun.summary: /backups create and schedule backup forms now use visible htmlFor/id labels for backup type, note, and cron controls; production DOM and full deploy smoke passed.

evidenceMatrix.browser_or_dom: Production browser logged in with temporary admin qa_cron_backup_label_20260608, opened /backups, and DOM proof confirmed create-backup-type SELECT DATABASE, create-backup-note INPUT with placeholder “可选：记录触发原因或范围”, schedule-backup-type SELECT DATABASE, and schedule-backup-cron INPUT value “0 3 * * *” are all present with visible label associations. Viewport/clientWidth 1910 equaled scrollWidth 1910 and no alert text was present.
evidenceMatrix.api: Public /api/status returned HTTP 200 healthy 3/3 after deployment; unauthenticated /backups returned 307 to /login?next=%2Fbackups, preserving the protected route boundary.
evidenceMatrix.db_or_persisted_config: Temporary qa_cron_backup_label_20260608 admin user was created only for production browser verification, then Prisma cleanup deleted 1 matching user and verified remaining qa_cron_* users 0.
evidenceMatrix.filesystem_or_sftp: No product filesystem/SFTP mutation was intended. Build artifacts were verified after npm run verify and ownership repaired for .next/dist before service restart.
evidenceMatrix.background_task_or_process: No overlapping verify/build/deploy process was active at selection time; production vcontrolhub-next.service, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service, and caddy handled the restarted deployment and smoke checks.
evidenceMatrix.runtime_or_ui_side_effect: The /backups create and schedule forms now expose visible labels through htmlFor/id instead of wrapping controls in labels, avoiding the DOM i18n bridge pitfall that previously removed nested select elements.
evidenceMatrix.permissions: The authenticated browser proof used a temporary admin session; unauthenticated protected-route behavior remained a 307 redirect and no QA user remains.
regression: npx vitest run src/app/backups/__tests__/page.test.tsx passed after adding label-query coverage for both backup type selects
npm run verify passed: full Vitest 214 files / 1005 tests, Next build, runtime build, deploy-assets
evidenceMatrix.production: Repaired ownership with chown -R vcontrolhub:vcontrolhub .next dist, restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service, reloaded/restarted caddy, confirmed /api/status 200 healthy, and ./deploy/smoke-test.sh whrkhldsb.qzz.io vcontrolhub passed ALL 25 CHECKS.
evidenceMatrix.logs: Recent journal scan over vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service for error|warn|failed|exception|EACCES|permission denied|Could not find a production build|Server Action returned no matches. Swap stayed at a single 6G /swapfile with about 1.0G used.
evidenceMatrix.cleanup: Deleted temporary qa_cron_backup_label_20260608 and verified qa_cron_* remaining 0; no canary files or containers were created.

evidence: Backup create form exposes visible labels for backup type and note.
Scheduled backup form keeps label-queryable type and Cron controls despite DOM i18n bridge translation.
Regression queries both backup type selects by label and production DOM proves the controls remain rendered.
remaining: Continue placeholder-only/low-visibility control patrol on lower-traffic pages such as image-bed/tickets/audit/AI.
QuickService durable job migration/config diff/history/rollback remains a higher-value P1 candidate.
